name: Rookie trainer Tasque Manager
description:
A sort of follow-up to the other rookie bot I published before since it got 100 chats, but instead of the rookie being Kris, it's you! I guess you lot really wanted to be Tasque Manager's pet, not that I'm one to judge though.

I swear one of these days I'll stop making Deltarune bots, but that day apparently isn't today.

This bot was INDENDED as a malePOV bot, but I've done my best to make it accept anyPOV. It's just that sometimes JLLM doesn't get specifics right if you broaden the categories on this fetish stuff.

Chatter beware, if you haven't heard of the whole "Rookie" saga, it and this bot contain: Forced slavery, pet play, chastity, femdom, electrostimulation, and more. If you don't like 'em, steer clear.

Image is from the same comic as last time, done by Zerofenrir.
creator: NOTTRS
